what_happened: 09:48 ET Bold heartbeat tick #6 timed out after 160s mid-bracket-placement. Parent BUY limit (5 qty 739C @ $1.74) was submitted to Alpaca but TP1 and stop legs were not placed before the wrapper kill-cascaded all PIDs. Order sat live on book as naked simple order with no stop. J authorized cancel at 09:54:37 ET before the order filled.
fix_proposal: Add atomic bracket guard to both heartbeat prompts: if parent order submits but stop leg placement fails (timeout, kill, API rejection), immediately cancel parent order. Never leave a naked option order on the book.
